title: Squirrel Removal in Bed-Stuy, Brooklyn | $900-$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Bedford-Stuyvesant, Brooklyn. Humane trapping, exclusion & attic cleanup. Licensed experts. Call Best Pest Control NYC today!
intro: Bed-Stuy's beautiful brownstones and historic row houses provide the perfect entry points for squirrels seeking warm attics and cozy wall voids. Best Pest Control NYC offers comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout Bedford-Stuyvesant, from Stuyvesant Heights to Ocean Hill. Our humane removal process includes trapping, exclusion, and complete damage repair to protect your Brooklyn home.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving Bed-Stuy homeowners for years with reliable, humane squirrel removal solutions tailored to Brooklyn's unique architecture. Our licensed technicians understand the challenges of squirrel infestations in multi-family brownstones and wood-frame homes, and we guarantee our exclusion work to prevent re-entry.
localContext: Bed-Stuy's tree-lined streets like Stuyvesant Avenue and the mature canopy throughout Herbert Von King Park create ideal squirrel habitats close to residential properties. The neighborhood's mix of century-old brownstones, townhouses, and newer construction along Fulton Street often feature the roof gaps, soffit damage, and chimney openings that squirrels exploit for nesting sites.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Bed-Stuy?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Bedford-Stuyvesant typically ranges from $900 to $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of attic damage. This includes humane trapping, full property exclusion, and cleanup. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing for all Bed-Stuy residents.

faqs.question: How do squirrels get into Bed-Stuy brownstones and homes?
faqs.answer: Squirrels commonly enter through damaged roof edges, gaps in cornices, uncapped chimneys, deteriorated soffit boards, and ventilation openings. Bed-Stuy's older brownstones are particularly vulnerable where original woodwork has weathered over time. Our technicians identify all current and potential entry points during the inspection process.

faqs.question: Is squirrel removal in Brooklyn humane?
faqs.answer: Yes, Best Pest Control NYC uses only humane, live-capture traps that comply with New York State wildlife regulations. After safely removing squirrels from your Bed-Stuy property, we relocate them according to local guidelines and seal all entry points to prevent their return without causing harm to the animals.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Bed-Stuy home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service throughout Bedford-Stuyvesant for squirrel emergencies. Most active infestations are resolved within 3-7 days, though complete exclusion work may take longer depending on the number of entry points and necessary repairs to your brownstone or home.
